message:
test: maintenance — paginated list envelope, br- prefix, label add subcommand, semver manifest comparisons

A handful of unrelated test fixes that had accumulated against
upstream API changes.  Each is isolated:

tests/e2e_wrap.rs
  `br list --json` now emits a paginated envelope
  `{"issues": [...], "total": N, ...}` rather than a bare array.
  All five test cases that decoded the output as `Vec<serde_json::Value>`
  were broken by that change.  Switched them to the existing
  `parse_list_issues()` helper, which returns the inner `issues` array
  regardless of envelope wrapping.

tests/proptest_id.rs
  Asserted the literal prefix `bd-` (Go-prototype prefix) instead of
  reading `IdConfig::default().prefix`, so the proptest failed
  immediately on the Rust port (default prefix `br-`).  Now derives
  the expected prefix from `IdConfig::default()` and asserts the
  structural property `<prefix>-<3+ chars>`.

tests/proptest_id.proptest-regressions
  New seed file checked in per proptest convention.  Records the
  shrunken counter-example `title = "𖭽"` (U+16B7D Pahawh Hmong digit)
  that previously triggered the literal-prefix assertion above; future
  runs will replay it before generating fresh cases.

tests/repro_3way_merge_bug.rs
  `br label <id> <tag>` was replaced by `br label add <id> <tag>` in
  the CLI restructure.  Updated the call site and added stderr to the
  assertion message so future regressions surface the actual error.

tests/repro_auto_flush_inefficiency.rs
  Added an `#[ignore]`-style header comment documenting why the
  auto_flush no-op optimization is pending: today auto_flush re-exports
  on any dirty flag even when the resulting JSONL would be byte-identical
  (e.g. change-then-revert).  Test stays in the file for when the
  optimization lands.

tests/package_manifests.rs
  test_version_consistency was failing every commit between releases
  because Cargo.toml gets bumped ahead of packaging/{homebrew,scoop,aur}
  manifests (those are rewritten by update-package-manifests.yml only
  after a release tag).  Switched from string-equality on the version
  field to `semver::Version::parse() + manifest_version <= cargo_version`,
  which keeps the safety net (manifest must never lead Cargo.toml) without
  the false positive.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 483256bd8000c862c9fde8b100288426d67d6737e049f5eb5a29db6d3c5bde9a # shrinks to title = "𖭽"
